executor.output（fTep custoner:[custonernane]（foustoner_eaail])VnRecent sovles:[*,.join（recent.movles)') rocent.novies=[aovietitle]fornovie inrecent.rentals]
AIE merId CROER BY COUNT(reotal.io) DESC LINIT1) SOL Oury: SELEcY flrstnano,last.nae,eall FRO publlc.custo#er WERE custo#r_id(SELECI customer_id FRO publlc.rental GouP 8Y custo
SOLRagponse:[frst_A#e':*ELEANOR,*lasLnaRo:HUNT','e#aiI:LEANOR,HUNTsakSlacustomr.rg']
SL Quory: SElECT f.title FRo public.rental r3oiN public.1nvontory i ON r.iventory.idi.inventory-ld Joi public.filn f C i.filn.id.rental-date DESC LIHITS fileLid EREr.cstomer_id*(SELECI custoerid FRO public.rental GROuP BY custooer-id CRDER BY COuNT(rental.i) DESC LIET 1) ORDER BYr
